purpose: Bestiary for sere. Each entry feeds the fauna-spawner, the loot tables, and the bestiary lens. SATIRE world — fauna is sparse and worn; the only awe left is anomalous.

creatures.lore: Thrives wherever the Mark concentrates and the people thin. Eight centuries of extraction culled almost everything; the tithe rat it fed.
creatures.cross_world_corollary: The commensal vermin that followed humanity onto the arks — Tunya tags the same lineage earth_import.

creatures.lore: Roosts on the Clearing Spire's ledges; collects coins it cannot spend. The clerks consider it lucky. The clerks are wrong about most things.
creatures.cross_world_corollary: Corvid intelligence the arks carried out; on Tunya its descendants are native-adjacent.

creatures.lore: Feral descendants of the foundry-combine's guard dogs, bred for the order book and then abandoned when the contract changed. They still patrol fences that no longer enclose anything.
creatures.cross_world_corollary: Domestic canid gone feral — the same stock that walked off the arks elsewhere.

creatures.lore: Native to the lowlands the rising water reclaimed. It learned the new shorelines faster than the people did.
creatures.cross_world_corollary: No corollary — a true Sere native, one of the few.

creatures.lore: Documented anomalies in Sere's oceans and skies that MIGHT indicate a presence older than the realms — or older than humanity's arrival. Sonar returns that shouldn't exist; lights under the water that hold formation; a shape the Quiet Fall's founding season never explained. The world ships the EVIDENCE, not the VERDICT: candidate explanations range from natural phenomena and instrument error to a non-native intelligence the Curtain was stood up to bury. Investigate it; the world will not tell you what it is.
creatures.cross_world_corollary: Unknown — and that is the point. Whether the Deep Watchers and the Quiet Fall are the same story is a thing the player weighs, never a thing Sere confirms.

candidate_explanations: salvaged Verge ordnance lost at sea
a non-native intelligence predating the realms (linked to the Quiet Fall)
